privileged_info_for_vlm: The database contains three target records with inverted names. Record 1 (GUID: FIX-INV-001) has Nom: 'Sophie', Prenom: 'MARTIN'. Record 2 (GUID: FIX-INV-002) has Nom: 'Thomas', Prenom: 'PETIT'. Record 3 (GUID: FIX-INV-003) has Nom: 'Lucas', Prenom: 'DUBOIS'. The correct values should swap these so Nom is the uppercase last name and Prenom is the first name. The tables to update are 'IndexNomPrenom' and 'fchpat'.
